title: Kim Bu Aile?
overview: Adem Haberdar's life takes a completely different turn when he has to leave the police after failing an important operation. Pursuing the gang that caused him to quit his job, Adem has to take over a chicken restaurant in order to follow the gang.

trailers.title: KIM BU AILE? OFFICIAL TRAILER | In Cinemas 13th October | GCC
